name: DeShawn Williams
about: 3 years in luxury apparel at Ralph Lauren and Marc Jacobs. Retailers praise his patience with clients and upselling instincts. Consistently hits accessory attach targets.
interviewTranscript: A time where I went above and beyond—a customer was getting married and we overnighted her a pair of shoes on Friday. The shoes arrived damaged from another location and there was nothing that could be done. So I took it upon myself to drive to another location where they had a second pair. I drove there and back and met her right before the ceremony. Since then we've built a long-lasting relationship. I'm truly passionate about what I do. I can adjust in any environment and I work effectively and efficiently.
